title: Zerna indurata
uses: Zerna indurata is known to have been traditionally used in some parts of the world for its medicinal properties. Its roots are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. However, more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption. The plant is also said to have been used to treat various ailments, including fever and digestive issues. Further studies are required to fully understand the extent of its medicinal uses.
